description_long: This object is a detailed representation of a cooked lobster, featuring a vibrant reddish-orange exoskeleton with white speckling and banded claws. The body is segmented into a robust cephalothorax and a tapered abdomen, with the claws prominently displayed at the front and secured with white bands. The legs are tucked beneath the body, and two long, thin antennae extend forward from the head. The surface texture appears hard and slightly rough, typical of a lobster shell, with a glossy finish that suggests it has been cooked. The eyes are small and positioned on short stalks at the front of the cephalothorax.
description: A cooked lobster with a reddish-orange, speckled shell, banded claws, and visible antennae. The surface is hard, glossy, and segmented, with legs tucked beneath the body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lobster's head, both claws with white bands, and antennae extending forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved body, segmented tail, and one claw with a visible band.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the broad claws, both banded, and the symmetry of the body and tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the full length of the lobster, the segmentation of the shell, and the right claw.
